observation.summary: Runtime upgrade flow evidence reports three reserved rules, but the root loop-engineering open gap registry still rendered as none.

hypothesis.summary: Promoting reserved runtime rules into root open gaps makes evidence debt observable without claiming implementation.

execution.summary: Add three runtime upgrade open gaps and regenerate the loop-engineering reader from the SSOT manifest.

evaluation.summary: loopevidence must report open_gap_count=3 while runtimeupgrade continues to report reserved_rules=3.

retrospective.summary: Reserved rules stay valid executable knowledge, but now surface as explicit next-artifact debt in the root loop view.

evidence.proves: root loop evidence exposes runtime reserved gaps
runtime upgrade evidence still distinguishes reserved rules from implemented rules
